content_body: This is by far my best experience in the mountains. We got engaged the day before we came, and that made our vacation together exciting. My fiance and I were together a year before we got engaged. The cabin was just perfect for us both. The lake view, the beautiful surroundings, EVERYTHING is wonderful! It is spaceful, neat and beyond grand. When we first arrived we called our parents telling them how nice it is and how we should plan a family trip for Thanksgiving. We're thinking about moving close by soon. This is a great place to come and get a piece of mind. It's good for my fiance and I because where we work is overboard with stress! We're thankful for the nice place. I'm sure we will be back soon! Thanks - The Future Mr. and Mrs.  Gary Leverett
title: Future Newlyweds Loved the Blue Ridge Lake Cottage
